creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: rm
Date: Fri Feb 15 11:02:38 2013
New Revision: 312285
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/312285

Log:
  - update to 0.6.3
  - correct dependency version
  
  while here:
  - remove redundancy from COMMENT
  - tab -> space change in pkg-descr:WWW
  
  PR:		175409
  Submitted by:	William Grzybowski <william88@gmail.com> (maintainer)

Modified:
  head/multimedia/py-subliminal/Makefile
  head/multimedia/py-subliminal/distinfo
  head/multimedia/py-subliminal/pkg-descr

Modified: head/multimedia/py-subliminal/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/multimedia/py-subliminal/Makefile	Fri Feb 15 10:53:01 2013	(r312284)
+++ head/multimedia/py-subliminal/Makefile	Fri Feb 15 11:02:38 2013	(r312285)
@@ -2,26 +2,27 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	subliminal
-PORTVERSION=	0.6.2
+PORTVERSION=	0.6.3
 CATEGORIES=	multimedia python
 MASTER_SITES=	CHEESESHOP
 PKGNAMEPREFIX=	${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}
 
 MAINTAINER=	william88@gmail.com
-COMMENT=	Subliminal is a python library to search and download subtitles
+COMMENT=	Python library to search and download subtitles
 
 LICENSE=	LGPL3
 
 RUN_DEPENDS=	${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}beautifulsoup>=4.0:${PORTSDIR}/www/py-beautifulsoup \
 		${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}enzyme>0:${PORTSDIR}/multimedia/py-enzyme \
 		${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}guessit>0:${PORTSDIR}/multimedia/py-guessit \
-		${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}requests>0:${PORTSDIR}/www/py-requests \
+		${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}requests<1:${PORTSDIR}/www/py-requests \
 		${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}html5lib>0:${PORTSDIR}/www/py-html5lib
 
 USE_PYTHON=	-2.7
 USE_PYDISTUTILS=	easy_install
 
-PLIST_FILES=	%%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/%%PYEASYINSTALL_EGG%% bin/subliminal
+PLIST_FILES=	bin/subliminal \
+		%%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/%%PYEASYINSTALL_EGG%%
 
 .include <bsd.port.pre.mk>
 

Modified: head/multimedia/py-subliminal/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- head/multimedia/py-subliminal/distinfo	Fri Feb 15 10:53:01 2013	(r312284)
+++ head/multimedia/py-subliminal/distinfo	Fri Feb 15 11:02:38 2013	(r312285)
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
-SHA256 (subliminal-0.6.2.tar.gz) = 7bfd89fc74f6d7c4c9b3f15e4401e5c3c8aedfbda39817275c47fb68fac69776
-SIZE (subliminal-0.6.2.tar.gz) = 61209
+SHA256 (subliminal-0.6.3.tar.gz) = 99c66b96281e796864138c701f4eb79d7d4a1879d6fb1913c74ad6ad790fb08a
+SIZE (subliminal-0.6.3.tar.gz) = 61261

Modified: head/multimedia/py-subliminal/pkg-descr
==============================================================================
--- head/multimedia/py-subliminal/pkg-descr	Fri Feb 15 10:53:01 2013	(r312284)
+++ head/multimedia/py-subliminal/pkg-descr	Fri Feb 15 11:02:38 2013	(r312285)
@@ -5,4 +5,4 @@ informations from filenames or filepaths
 subtitles. It also relies on enzyme to detect embedded subtitles and avoid
 duplicates.
 
-WWW:	http://subliminal.readthedocs.org/en/latest/index.html
+WWW: http://subliminal.readthedocs.org/en/latest/index.html
